result:
Validation complete. Two minor issues identified:

1. **Section too short** - The section contains only 26 characters, below the 50-character threshold
2. **Hint not in source** - The Japanese hint "タグリファレンス" is added but not found in the source file (which only contains English "tag_reference")

Both are minor severity issues. The knowledge file accurately represents the source content, which itself is purely navigational.

findings.description: Section content is 26 characters (":ref:`tag_reference` を参照。"), which is below the 50-character minimum threshold. This indicates an extremely minimal section containing only a navigation pointer with no substantive content.
findings.source_evidence: Source file content: ':ref:`tag_reference` を参照。' (single line of pure navigation reference)

findings.description: The hint "タグリファレンス" is not explicitly found in the source file. The source contains only the English term "tag_reference", not its Japanese translation/variant. While this may be a helpful keyword for Japanese users of the tool, it has no explicit basis in the source documentation.
findings.source_evidence: Source file heading and content contain only "tag_reference" (English); no Japanese "タグリファレンス" appears anywhere in the source
